finding_results.notes: Babbling's pushback is now distributed across five turns (was four) with one explicit question ('You understand the distinction?') and one self-revision pause ('I want that to be clear'). No single turn contains the full argument. Miren's skepticism is delivered across three turns with two interruptions ('No, wait' at line 257 cutting off Gavin's 'I know that, but —', and a direct override at line 261 cutting off 'That's not —'). Register preserved: Babbling remains low-contraction and formally precise; Miren remains high-contraction and direct. Gavin's failed interjections are character-true (unfinished, hedging). Physical gesture ('She pulled her other leg under herself') callbacks the earlier one-leg tuck at line 203. Content and argument substance unchanged; only the delivery cadence was restructured.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 8 now stages Gavin's failed explanations on the page, separates Babbling's and Miren's refusals into different kinds of loss, and exceeds the minimum word-count target without broad scene churn.

Single finding addressed: skeptical rebuttals from Babbling and Miren were delivered as polished mini-essays in single turns. Babbling's cosmological-model speech (line 139) was split into two turns with a genuine question between them, and her notation/translation speech (line 151) received a self-corrective pause that breaks the lecture rhythm. Miren's epistemic case (line 253) was distributed across three turns with two interruptions where Gavin attempts and fails to interject. All changes are local to the cited spans; no scene restructuring, no content alteration, no register drift. Character voice profiles (Babbling: low contraction, academic self-correction; Miren: high contraction, direct, 'no'/'wait' interruption habit; Gavin: high contraction, trailing qualifiers, lets interruptions happen) are maintained per style bible.
Addressed the packet's prose repetition finding by varying the chapter's return beats and tightening Gavin's descriptions of the failing wards and the outside without softening the scene's pressure.
